title: Create a Zora Coin
description: Create a new coin on Zora. Add a name, symbol, and media (image or video) for your coin.

success.title: Coin Created Successfully!
success.description: Your coin has been deployed on Base. Here is the summary:
success.userCreatorCoinDesc: Your Creator Coin (resolved from wallet address)

pending.processingVideoBody: Generating thumbnail from video frame, then uploading to IPFS
pending.uploadingTitle: Uploading to IPFS and preparing transaction...
pending.uploadingBody: Please sign the transaction in your wallet

form.gnarsCoinDesc: Backed by Gnars DAO token. Provides established liquidity and community support. Every token buy will buy $GNARS first then the coin. Making $GNARS stronger!
form.myCreatorCoinDesc: Backed by your personal creator coin. Creates a coin family within your ecosystem. Gnars treasure will get $ZORA rewards too!
form.noCreatorCoin: You don't have a creator coin yet. Only $GNARS backing is available. To use your own creator coin, deploy one first.
form.sdkResolveNote: The SDK will resolve this to your creator coin address automatically.
form.uploadFormats:
Images: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG
Videos: MP4 (recommended), WebM, MOV • Max: 420MB (but please keep it small!)
form.noThumbnail:
No thumbnail selected.
Click "Select Thumbnail" to choose one.
form.step1: Your media will be uploaded to Zora IPFS network
form.step2: Metadata will be validated and stored on IPFS
form.step3: Your wallet will open to confirm the transaction
form.step4: The coin will be deployed on Base network
form.connectToCreate: Connect your wallet to create a coin

toasts.confirmTransaction: Please confirm the transaction in your wallet...
toasts.invalidImageType: Image type not supported. Please use: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, or SVG
toasts.invalidVideoType: Video type not supported. Please use: MP4, WebM, or MOV
toasts.invalidFileType: Please upload an image or video file
toasts.fileTooLarge: File size must be less than 420MB
toasts.symbolTooLong: Symbol must be 10 characters or less
toasts.uploadMedia: Please upload an image or video
toasts.selectThumbnail: Please select a thumbnail for your video

errors.invalidFile: Please upload an image or video file
errors.unsupportedImage: Image type not supported. Please use: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, or SVG
errors.unsupportedVideo: Video type not supported. Please use: MP4, WebM, or MOV
errors.fileTooLarge: File size must be less than 420MB
errors.noMedia: Please upload an image or video
